_comment: Local index of canonical trust boundaries. One entry per canonical domain.

entries._manifestUrlTodo: TODO: Later, replace this with a GitHub raw URL (e.g. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/<org>/aptrust-records/main/domains/jhu.edu/manifest.jsonld) OR keep /manifest/:domain as a 302 redirect to that raw URL. See server/index.js GET /manifest/:domain.
entries._manifestHashTodo: TODO: Replace with real sha256-<hex> once the manifest is frozen. Extension has SHA-256 scaffolding; turn on by setting hashVerificationEnabled=true.
